hero.title: YOUR DIGITAL KITCHEN ASSISTANT THAT TAKES ON THE MOST BORING WORK
hero.description: Sugar price changed? One click and the cost of desserts is updated. Need a cake for 5 kg instead of 2? The system will recalculate the ingredients automatically.

step1.title: Choose a recipe
step1.description: Find the dessert you need in the catalog or create your own recipe from scratch.

step2.title: Set new parameters
step2.description: Specify the desired weight, number of servings, or shape — the system will adapt to your needs.

step3.title: Get the recalculation
step3.description: Instantly receive an updated list of ingredients, weight, and cost of the dessert.
